# What's new in Copilot Studio

Page last updated: 2026-03-09

## March 2026
- (Preview) Use Work IQ tools to connect Microsoft 365 Copilot and agents to the Work IQ service for real-time work insights and context from Microsoft 365 files, emails, meetings, chats, and more.

## February 2026
- Improved agent responses for ticket-based Microsoft 365 Graph connectors (ServiceNow tickets, Azure DevOps work items).
- Select Claude Sonnet 4.5 (beta) for Computer Use agents, improving nuanced decision-making.
- Prompt builder enhancements:
    - Configure content moderation sensitivity per prompt (hate/fairness, sexual, violence, self-harm).
    - Optimize prompts with Claude Opus 4.6 or Claude Sonnet 4.5 model selection.
    - Edit prompt instructions and settings inline in agent tool details.

## January 2026
- (Preview) Agent evaluations enhancements: thumbs-up/down feedback, activity maps, CSV template for test sets.
- (Preview) Expanded computer use capabilities: new model support, built-in credentials, enhanced audit logging with session replay, Cloud PC pooling.
- (GA) Microsoft Copilot Studio extension for Visual Studio Code.

## December 2025
- Compare multiple agent versions side by side for evaluation.

## November 2025
- GPT-5 Chat GA rollout for European and US regions.
- (Preview) Automatic Microsoft Entra agent identities.
- Improved SharePoint-grounded knowledge retrieval with tenant graph grounding.
- SharePoint metadata filters for knowledge retrieval.
- Orchestrate multiple agents for complex tasks (including Microsoft Fabric data agents).
- (Preview) Tool groups for faster agent setup.
- Copy agents from Microsoft 365 Copilot to Copilot Studio.
- (Preview) Request for information action for human input in workflows.
- New 'copilotstudio' namespace for Power Platform API calls.
- Component collections enhancements (child agents, MCP support).

## October 2025
- GPT-4o retired; GPT-4.1 default model for generative orchestration.
- Multiple AI model selection for agents.
- (Preview) GPT-5 models for testing.
- Copilot Studio Kit suite of tools.
- (Preview) Themes for grouping user questions.
- Time and cost savings tracking for agents.
- Unified activity and transcript view.
- (Preview) Accelerate flow execution.
- Model Context Protocol (MCP) server support.
- (Preview) Agent evaluation with customizable test sets.

## September 2025
- (Preview) Computer-Using Agents (CUA) for desktop applications.
- Client SDK for embedding agents in Android, iOS, Windows apps.
- (Preview) Upload Excel, CSV, PDF for code interpreter analysis.

## August 2025
- (GA) Code interpreter for Python code generation.
- (GA) File groups for knowledge sources.
- File and image upload for agent analysis.
- (GA) Generated answer rate and quality analytics.
- MCP server connection via guided experience.

## July 2025
- Advanced NLU customization.
- Search across agent components.
- ROI analytics for autonomous agents.
- Thumbs up/down comments in analytics.
- (Preview) Microsoft Information Protection (MIP) labels.
- WhatsApp publishing.
- (Preview) SSO Consent Card for Entra ID.

## June 2025
- Improved tools experience (grouping, filtering, IntelliSense, auto-detection of SSO).
- (Preview) Microsoft 365 Copilot Tuning for fine-tuned models.
- Actionable insights for unanswered questions.
- Knowledge sources analysis for autonomous agents.
- Power Fx formulas in prompt builder.
- Regular expression support in Power Fx.
- (Preview) File groups as knowledge sources.
- (Preview) Generative orchestration for all supported languages.
- Redesigned Channels page.
- (US-only preview) GPT-4.1 mini experimental response model.

Updated: 2026-04-01
